mapper.select: select id, material_name, unit, price, stock, create_time, update_time from tb_material where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_material(material_name, unit, price, stock, create_time, update_time) values (#{materialName}, #{unit}, #{price}, #{stock}, now(), #{updateTime})

insert into tb_material(material_name, unit, price, stock, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.materialName}, #{entity.unit}, #{entity.price}, #{entity.stock}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into tb_material(material_name, unit, price, stock, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.materialName}, #{entity.unit}, #{entity.price}, #{entity.stock}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update material_name = values(material_name), unit = values(unit), price = values(price), stock = values(stock), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.update:
update tb_material
material_name = #{materialName},
unit = #{unit},
price = #{price},
stock = #{stock},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM tb_material
material_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{materialName},'%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_material SET stock=#{newStock} WHERE id=#{id}
